title: Project Manager projects
description: List of favorite projects managed by the Project Manager extension.

rootPath.description: Root path of the project. May use `~` or `$home` to refer to the user home directory, or a remote URI such as `vscode-remote://...`.

paths.description: Additional folders that belong to this project (multi-root workspaces).

tags.description: Tags used to group and filter the project in the Favorites view.

enabled.description: Whether the project is shown in the project list.

profile.description: VS Code profile to use when opening this project. Leave empty to use the default profile.

description.description: Free-text description shown in the sidebar (after the name) and in the tooltip.

icon.description: Codicon id used to override the default sidebar icon (e.g. `rocket`, `flame`, `database`). See https://microsoft.github.io/vscode-codicons/ for the full list. Leave empty to use the default.
